next_steps: Perform skin scrapings of lesions and interdigital spaces for microscopic examination for Sarcoptes scabiei
Obtain RPR and treponemal-specific testing for syphilis
Initiate empiric treatment for scabies with permethrin 5% cream and consider ivermectin
Perform HIV testing and full sexually transmitted infection screening
Isolate the patient to prevent potential spread of scabies to other shelter residents or hospital staff
Obtain a biopsy of a skin lesion for histopathology if initial testing is nondiagnostic

differential_diagnoses: Pediculosis corporis with secondary bacterial infection
next_steps: Obtain RPR and treponemal-specific testing for syphilis
Perform HIV testing and full STI panel
Perform skin scrapings for microscopic examination for Sarcoptes scabiei
Perform swab/culture of the oral ulcer (HSV, syphilis, bacterial)
Implement contact isolation precautions for potential scabies
Initiate empiric treatment for scabies (permethrin and/or ivermectin) pending definitive diagnosis
Perform detailed physical exam for lymphadenopathy and specific syphilitic stigmata
